title: Prison
description: Trap your friends in a depressing prison world
body:
## 🪨 Prison Dimension

**Prison Dimension** is my very first Minecraft mod, made for one simple goal:  
to trap your friends in a bleak, depressing prison world… possibly forever.

This mod adds a brand-new **gray, lifeless dimension** where **pillagers spawn** and escape is not guaranteed.

---

### 🔐 How it works

- Obtain a **Key** from a **Level 3 Toolsmith Villager**
- Use the key to craft **Handcuffs**
- Build a special portal:
  - Same shape as a Nether portal
  - Made from **Smooth Stone**
- Use the **Handcuffs** on the portal to activate it

This opens a portal to the **Prison Dimension**.

---

### 🧱 No escape

To prevent your friends from escaping the way they came, you can now **craft Bedrock**:

- **8 Obsidian** surrounding **1 Nether Star**

Use the crafted Bedrock to **block the portal** and permanently trap players inside the Prison Dimension.

---

### ⚠️ Warning

This mod is intended for **chaotic multiplayer fun**.  
Players trapped in the Prison Dimension may be stuck **forever** unless a server admin intervenes.

Use responsibly… or don’t.
